current_facts: 当前不是 true 3D world model。
当前不是 large-scale foundation world model。
当前仍是 protected dataset-local / raw-frame 2.5D 多智能体 world-state candidate。
Stage42-CD 是官方源获取与接入准备包，不下载数据，不转换数据，不训练模型。
Stage42-CB/CC 已证明 t50 source diversity blocker 仍 active；本包不能把 blocker 包装成完成。
OpenTraj toolkit / wrapper 许可不能自动覆盖 ETH/UCY/TrajNet 等底层第三方数据许可。
future endpoints / waypoints 只允许作为 supervised labels 或 evaluation labels，不作为 inference input。
不使用 central velocity，不使用 test endpoints 构建 goals，不使用 test metrics 调 threshold。
t+50 / t+100 仍是 raw-frame horizon，不能写成 seconds-level。
Stage5C 未执行，SMC 未启用。

official_targets.name: UCY Crowd Data original source
official_targets.expected_role: independent t50-capable UCY/students/crowd source if legal long tracks are provided
official_targets.why_needed: Stage42-CB/CC show UCY t50 evidence is source-concentrated; another independent UCY/students-family long source is needed for source-CV.
conversion_after_user_path: verify original dataset terms and source identity
build source-level train/internal-val/final-test split without test endpoint goals
rerun t50 source-CV and protected policy final test once

official_targets.name: ETH / BIWI walking pedestrians original source
official_targets.expected_role: same-family ETH_seq long-track support with homography/metadata hints when legally usable
official_targets.why_needed: ETH_seq t50 is still blocked because ETH-Person XML technical signal did not safely repair the ETH_seq holdout and terms remain unresolved.
conversion_after_user_path: verify ETH/BIWI source terms and citation requirements
separate alternate-format files from independent held-out sources
audit frame step/FPS/homography only as source-specific evidence
rerun ETH_seq t50 source-CV under validation-only policy

official_targets.name: TrajNet++ official challenge/source page
official_targets.expected_role: scene-format diagnostics or long raw tracks only if legally provided; challenge snippets alone are too short for raw-frame t100 source-CV
official_targets.why_needed: Stage42-BV/CC show local TrajNet rows are dominated by short snippets or synthetic diagnostic data, not legal raw long-track t100 support.
conversion_after_user_path: verify official challenge or source terms
separate scene snippets from raw long tracks
do not count synthetic ORCA diagnostic rows as real external evidence
run raw-frame horizon audit before any t100 claim

official_targets.name: OpenTraj official GitHub toolkit
official_targets.expected_role: loader/toolkit support and dataset indexing; not an independent data license by itself
official_targets.why_needed: OpenTraj helps identify paths/loaders, but Stage42 must preserve underlying ETH/UCY/TrajNet terms and source identity.
conversion_after_user_path: resolve every underlying dataset to its own terms
do not count toolkit clone as converted/evaluated data

official_targets.name: Additional legal top-down pedestrian/drone long-track source
official_targets.expected_role: independent non-SDD top-down pedestrian/drone t50/t100 source if terms permit
official_targets.why_needed: A non-ETH/UCY/TrajNet source would test whether M3W is broader than the current source families.
conversion_after_user_path: audit coordinate unit, frame step, track length, scene identity, and agent type
convert only if no-leakage source-level split is possible
